_comment: Rolepod hook config. Schema: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/blob/main/docs/hooks/reference.md (verified 2026-06-23). Events used: BeforeAgent (claim-verify nudge on the answer path — Gemini's equivalent of Claude/Codex UserPromptSubmit; injects hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext before the agent plans), SessionStart (context inject), BeforeTool (verify-first reminder), AfterTool (verify-after reminder on Edit/Write/replace), PreCompress (state checkpoint).

hooks.name: rolepod-claim-verify-nudge
hooks.description: Soft read-first nudge when the prompt asks for an analysis/diagnosis/status about real code.

SessionStart._comment: Lifecycle matcher = exact string per Gemini hooks spec. Pipe-separated covers all session start reasons.

hooks.name: rolepod-context-inject
hooks.description: Inject git log + hot files + rolepod gates reminder.

hooks.name: rolepod-verify-first
hooks.description: Remind verify-first: confirm facts before claiming.

hooks.name: rolepod-verify-after
hooks.description: Remind: every change ends with evidence (test / screenshot / curl / log).

hooks.name: rolepod-pre-compress
hooks.description: Inject open-gate checkpoint so state survives history summarization.
